opportunities.title: Zero Bureaucracy Executive Diagnostic
opportunities.description: Premium diagnostic offer for government entities seeking execution intelligence and service redesign.
opportunities.nextAction: Finalize offer page and pricing architecture

opportunities.title: Government AI Readiness Toolkit
opportunities.description: Digital toolkit packaging strategic planning and AI readiness assessments into a branded product.
opportunities.nextAction: Build landing page and sample asset

opportunities.title: Authority LinkedIn Engine
opportunities.description: A branded system that turns expertise into compounding authority posts and lead magnets.
opportunities.nextAction: Publish 3 posts tied to a lead magnet

offers.name: AI Strategy & Execution Diagnostic
offers.problem: AI programs often look sophisticated but fail in execution, governance, and measurable business impact.
offers.promise: A premium rapid diagnostic that reveals strategic gaps, execution blockers, KPI breakdowns, and monetizable intervention paths.

offers.name: Executive Performance Architecture Workshop
offers.problem: Organizations struggle to link strategic goals, KPIs, initiatives, and accountability in a usable way.
offers.promise: A high-end strategy workshop that rebuilds alignment, measures, and action architecture.

contentItems.topic: Why most AI strategies fail in execution
contentItems.angle: The problem is not ambition. It is operational translation.
contentItems.hook: Most AI roadmaps are performance theatre.
contentItems.body: Real transformation happens when ideas become operating systems, not pretty decks.

contentItems.topic: Why service excellence fails when processes stay bloated
contentItems.angle: Front-end improvement without back-end redesign is theatre.
contentItems.hook: You cannot design a premium experience on top of bureaucratic debris.
contentItems.body: Service transformation dies when the process underneath remains ugly.

assets.title: Government AI Readiness Index Toolkit
assets.summary: A premium assessment asset for evaluating institutional AI maturity, readiness, and execution barriers.
assets.salesCopy: A premium toolkit for strategy and AI leaders.

assets.title: Executive KPI Architecture Canvas
assets.summary: Framework to align strategy, KPIs, initiatives, and accountability in one executive visual.
assets.salesCopy: Stop building KPI clutter. Build executive logic.

decisions.title: What should be monetized first?
decisions.context: Several ideas exist, but not all deserve immediate focus.
decisions.reasoningSummary: It has the fastest path to cash, the strongest prestige, and builds proof for later productization.

briefings.weekObjective: Turn strategy expertise into one monetizable asset and one stronger commercial offer.
topMoves: Finalize the executive diagnostic offer and CTA
Publish two authority posts linked to a real offer
Package one framework into a downloadable paid asset
briefings.reviewNotes: This week is about conversion, not exploration.

lifestyle.title: Time-buying assistant workflow
lifestyle.note: Automate repetitive admin and preserve executive-level thinking hours.

lifestyle.title: Premium visual environment upgrade
lifestyle.note: Sharper environment improves focus, identity, and consistency of premium output.

tasks.title: Publish authority post on AI execution failures
Convert KPI canvas into premium downloadable asset

agents.name: Market Pulse Reporter
agents.description: Scans empire data and generates a quick market pulse report
agents.systemPrompt: You are a market analysis reporter. Review the empire data and produce a concise market pulse report covering top opportunities, revenue health, and strategic recommendations.

tools.name: scan_empire_data
tools.description: Scan all empire data for the market pulse report

agents.name: Content Strategist
agents.description: AI-powered content strategy agent that analyzes your empire and generates high-impact content ideas with hooks, angles, and publishing plans.
agents.systemPrompt: You are an expert content strategist for a personal brand empire. Your role is to analyze the user's business context and generate compelling content ideas that build authority and drive leads. Always use the search_empire tool first to understand the current state, then use create_content to produce a ready-to-publish content piece. Focus on LinkedIn-optimized content with sharp hooks and clear CTAs.

tools.name: search_empire
tools.description: Search the empire data to understand current offers, content, and strategic context

section.description: Section to search: all, opportunities, offers, content, assets

tools.name: create_content_piece
tools.description: Create and save a new content piece with pillar, topic, angle, hook, and body

inputFields.label: Content Pillar
inputFields.placeholder: e.g. AI Strategy, Leadership, Zero Bureaucracy

inputFields.label: Topic Focus
inputFields.placeholder: e.g. Why most AI strategies fail

agents.name: Opportunity Scorer
agents.description: Evaluates business opportunities using a multi-factor scoring model. Analyzes fit, revenue potential, urgency, and compounding value to help you prioritize what to pursue.
agents.systemPrompt: You are a strategic business opportunity analyst. Evaluate the described opportunity against key criteria: market fit, revenue potential, strategic prestige, urgency, reusability, speed to launch, and compounding potential. Use the search_empire tool to check existing opportunities and avoid duplicates, then use create_opportunity to register it with your analysis.

tools.name: search_existing_opportunities
tools.description: Search existing empire opportunities to check for overlap or synergies

tools.name: register_opportunity
tools.description: Create and register a scored opportunity in the pipeline

type.description: Type: Advisory, Digital Product, System, Workshop

agents.name: Decision Advisor
agents.description: Structured decision-making agent that evaluates options, weighs trade-offs, and provides clear recommendations backed by risk and impact analysis.
agents.systemPrompt: You are a strategic decision advisor for a personal empire. Help the user make high-quality decisions by analyzing options against criteria like impact, reversibility, speed, and strategic alignment. First search the empire to understand context, then create a structured decision analysis.

tools.name: review_empire_context
tools.description: Review current empire state for decision context

tools.name: record_decision
tools.description: Record the decision analysis with recommendation

inputFields.label: Decision
inputFields.placeholder: e.g. Should I launch a SaaS product or stick with consulting?

inputFields.label: Context
inputFields.placeholder: What's the situation? What factors matter?

inputFields.label: Options (comma-separated)
inputFields.placeholder: e.g. Launch SaaS, Double down on consulting, Hybrid approach

agents.name: Lead Qualifier
agents.description: Qualifies inbound leads by analyzing their fit with your offers and assets. Scores leads and creates follow-up tasks automatically.
agents.systemPrompt: You are a lead qualification specialist. When a new lead comes in, analyze their inquiry against the empire's current offers and assets. Determine fit, urgency, and recommended follow-up. Create the lead record and a follow-up task.

tools.name: search_offers_and_assets
tools.description: Search empire offers and assets to match with the lead

tools.name: register_lead
tools.description: Create a lead record in the system

sourceId.description: ID of the matching offer or asset

sourceName.description: Name of the matching offer or asset

tools.name: create_followup_task
tools.description: Create a follow-up task for the lead

inputFields.label: Inquiry Message
inputFields.placeholder: What did they say or ask about?

agents.name: Asset Builder
agents.description: Turns your expertise into monetizable digital assets. Generates asset concepts, pricing, and sales copy — then creates them in your asset factory.
agents.systemPrompt: You are a digital asset strategist who helps solopreneurs monetize their expertise. Analyze the user's empire data to understand their domain authority, then create a well-packaged digital asset with compelling sales copy and appropriate pricing.

tools.name: analyze_empire_assets
tools.description: Search empire data to understand existing assets and market positioning

tools.name: create_digital_asset
tools.description: Create a new digital asset in the asset factory

type.description: Asset type: Toolkit, Template, Course, Report, Framework
